acceptance_criteria: sim.rs reproduces the js similarity selftest table within 0.01
description: cargo new rust-core: modules walk.rs (parallel fs walk honoring .gitignore via `ignore` crate), hash.rs (xxh3 fast-path + sha256 where manifests require it), sim.rs (port of the token-shingle similarity from tools/lib/similarity — must reproduce the selftest score table). CLI: smarch-core scan --json / hash --json / sim --json reading args + emitting the JSON protocol documented in rust-core/PROTOCOL.md (stable field names = the node scanner's shapes).
title: rust-core crate: walk + hash + similarity kernel

acceptance_criteria: scan produces identical registry output with kernel on and off (fixture portfolio)
description: tools/lib/rust-core.mjs: locate binary (SMA_CORE_BIN env > PATH), spawn with JSON protocol, transparent fallback to the node implementation when absent or SMA_CORE=off; integrate at the scan-walk seam (UV-RG-scan-walk-extraction).
title: Node adapter + transparent fallback

acceptance_criteria: intentional kernel bug caught by suite
description: Parity test: run full scan on the fixture portfolio with node walk and rust walk; assert identical brick sets, hashes, and violation findings. CI job (optional matrix leg, skips without cargo).
title: Kernel parity suite vs node scanner

description: cargo build --release matrix in the release workflow; strip + upload artifacts; README install note (optional accelerator, never required).
title: Release binaries for linux-x64 + darwin-arm64

description: Create tasklists/rust/_MODULE.md: ownership paths, lane default, gates, graph location, hot-path borders.
title: Write module charter for rust

description: Document rust: responsibility, public seams, how to run/test it locally.
title: Module docs baseline for rust

acceptance_criteria: graph exists and answers a sample ownership question
description: Refresh/create the Graphify module graph for rust so agents can query before broad reads.
title: Graphify module graph for rust

acceptance_criteria: gen3 classifier maps rust paths to rust
description: Add/verify rust module ownership paths in sma.gen3.json; no path overlaps with other modules.
title: Register rust ownership in sma.gen3.json

acceptance_criteria: budget documented and measured in CI
description: Define rust-specific budgets in 07-PERFORMANCE-PLAN.md terms and add the measuring check to CI.
title: Performance budgets for rust

acceptance_criteria: telemetry audit passes for rust paths
description: Audit rust for silent catches and ignored promise failures; wire all real errors into the project telemetry with area/severity/context.
title: Telemetry coverage baseline for rust

acceptance_criteria: module test command exists and runs in CI on affected changes
description: Ensure rust has a runnable module-scoped test command wired into affected-CI so single-module lanes gate locally.
title: Test harness and CI wiring for rust

acceptance_criteria: the named failure mode has a test that fails before the fix and passes after
description: rust-core promises hashing/merkle but tasks cover scanner hashes only. Port tools/lib/merkle.mjs semantics (domain separation, odd-leaf duplication, inclusion proofs) to rust-core and add cross-language root+proof parity tests. [P8.5 skeptic finding, 2026-07-10 round 1]
title: Add Rust Merkle implementation and provenance parity suite
